rationale: Review 2 correctly identifies two real, diff-confirmed naming problems: (1) the vacuous `ReductiveGroup.unipotentRadical_trivial'` theorem uses mixed camelCase/snake_case, carries a gratuitous prime, and its name misleadingly implies a substantive result when the statement is just `True`; (2) `unipotent_radical_trivial`/`radical_trivial` use snake_case while the adjacent `AffineAlgGroup` fields use camelCase. Acting on Review 2 fixes genuine style violations; Review 1 misses both issues entirely.
